summary: Tested 6 BLOCKs: 298 (Streaming Overlay Ghost Icons), 287 (Weekly Report No Blank Data), 290 (Daily Prompt Instant-On), 291 (Weekly Report Story Mode), 292+293 (Instagram Story Export), 285 (Profile 2-Column Layout). All features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PostCards.js lines 33-63: StreamingOverlay component renders ghost-style icons (white/translucent at rest, color on hover) at absolute bottom-1.5 right-1.5 z-[7] position
PostCards.js line 302: StreamingOverlay correctly placed inside NowSpinningCard album art div
DailyPrompt.js lines 70-75: Loading state shows warm-toned placeholder bars instead of Skeleton shimmer
DailyPrompt.js lines 147-178: Streaming overlay icons added to Daily Prompt carousel album art
WeeklyReportPage.js lines 40-51: IntroSlide shows 'THE HONEY GROOVE' branding and '@username's Week in the Hive'
WeeklyReportPage.js lines 250-264: FreshStartSlide fallback for 0 spins showing 'A Fresh Start in the Hive' instead of blank/no data
WeeklyReportPage.js lines 203-247: ShareCard component renders 1080x1920 canvas with safe zones for Instagram story export
WeeklyReportPage.js lines 345-378: handleShare uses html2canvas for export, triggers download or native share
AlbumArt.js line 80: Added decoding='sync' for priority images
context_for_next_testing_agent: 6 BLOCKs tested: (1) BLOCK 298 - Streaming overlay ghost icons found on Now Spinning cards at bottom-right of album art, icons are white/translucent at rest; (2) BLOCK 287 - Weekly Report shows 'A Fresh Start in the Hive' for users with 0 spins instead of blank screen; (3) BLOCK 290 - Daily Prompt uses warm-toned placeholder bars instead of generic shimmer/skeleton; (4) BLOCK 291 - Weekly Report has vertical story mode with IntroSlide, HeroSlide/FreshStartSlide, StatsSlide, GenreSlide, MilestoneSlide, ShareSlide; (5) BLOCK 292+293 - Share export button present with hidden ShareCard (1080x1920) using html2canvas; (6) BLOCK 285 - Profile shows 2-column layout (Identity Card left, Stats Card right) at desktop width. Note: Week in Wax section only appears on own profile with records > 0. testuser has 0 records so it doesn't show.

BLOCK_298_streaming_overlay.details: 2 streaming overlay containers found on Hive feed, each with Spotify and Apple Music ghost icons. Position: absolute bottom-1.5 right-1.5 z-[7]. Icons use inline onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave for color change (white->Spotify green/#1DB954 or Apple red/#FC3C44).

BLOCK_287_no_blank_data.details: Weekly Report page shows 'Digging through the crates...' during loading. For users with 0 spins, shows FreshStartSlide with 'A Fresh Start in the Hive' message instead of blank/no data screen.

BLOCK_290_daily_prompt_instant_on.details: DailyPromptCard loading state shows warm-toned placeholder bars (rgba(200,134,26,0.12) background) instead of generic Skeleton shimmer component. No generic animate-pulse skeleton found in prompt card.

BLOCK_291_weekly_report_story_mode.details: WeeklyReportPage has vertical snap-scrolling slides: IntroSlide ('THE HONEY GROOVE' + '@username's Week in the Hive'), HeroSlide/FreshStartSlide, StatsSlide (Spins/Added/Collection Value), GenreSlide, NewAdditionsSlide, MilestoneSlide, ShareSlide. Uses scroll-snap-type: y mandatory for story-like feel.

BLOCK_292_293_share_export.details: Share CTA slide with 'Share Your Week' button (data-testid='share-week-btn'). Hidden ShareCard component renders 1080x1920 canvas with safe zones (top 250px, bottom 300px). Uses html2canvas for export. Button triggers download on desktop or native share on mobile.

BLOCK_285_profile_2_column.details: Profile page at desktop width shows 2-column layout: Left (Identity Card with avatar, username, badges, Follow/Message buttons), Right (Stats Card with Following/Followers/Records/Est.Value). Tabs are sticky at top.

mocked_api_note: Streaming links use search URL placeholders (open.spotify.com/search/{query}, music.apple.com/us/search?term={query}), not real Spotify/Apple Music API integrations
